heroHeadline: MH17: 298 Killed, Russia Convicted in Absentia
heroSubtitle: Dutch-led JIT established Buk missile from Russia's 53rd Brigade downed MH17 on 17 July 2014 over eastern Ukraine. Three suspects convicted in absentia by The Hague court in November 2022. Russia continues to deny involvement.
footerNote: Data sourced from Dutch Safety Board, Joint Investigation Team, Netherlands District Court, and major international outlets.
